name: virlo
description: Ask 'what's going viral in my niche right now, and why?' — real-time TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels intelligence via Virlo Content Research Agents, with weighted virality score, rising-creator outliers, winning formats, and regional AI trend analysis.
_notes: This is the reference entry Vellum lists in their marketplace repo (e.g. vellum-ai/marketplace). The plugin source stays here in Virlo-AI/virlo-integrations; Vellum's marketplace just points at it via `source`.
